name: MitronPolitan - Life in 20s
overview: New city. New flatmates. New level of madness. On his 21st birthday, Rajat moves to Mumbai and steps into a flat full of urban misfits whose love language is roasting! Will Rajat crack the roast code or just crack under the pressure?
